privateInfo.title: Private User Info
privateInfo.description: Sensitive personal information accessible only to the owner

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when private info was updated

publicProfile.title: Public Profile
publicProfile.description: Public-facing profile information accessible to all authenticated users

photoURL.description: URL to the user profile image

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when public profile was updated

task.title: Task
task.description: A single task item on the collaborative task board

dueDate.description: Due date formatted as ISO string

ownerId.description: User ID of the task creator

ownerName.description: Display name of the task creator

assigneeId.description: User ID of the assigned user, empty if unassigned

assigneeName.description: Display name of the assigned user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated

users/{userId}/private/info.description: Private sensitive data of a given user

users/{userId}/public/profile.description: Public profile details of a given user

tasks/{taskId}.description: Tasks stored globally and collaborative in nature
